EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"Minfecha", CALCULATE(MIN('movimientos'[fecha])),
		"Maxfecha", CALCULATE(MAX('movimientos'[fecha]))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('movimientos'[fecha])),
			'movimientos'[fecha] < DATE(2026, 6, 22)
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('categorias'[nombre], __DS0FilterTable, "Total", 'movimientos'[Total])

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, [Total], 0, 'categorias'[nombre], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[Total] DESC, 'categorias'[nombre]

	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

			"Balance", 'movimientos'[Balance],
			"MinDate", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('LocalDateTable_98ec073c-6827-4a1c-b7dd-712c20b0b47f'[Date])))
		)

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0BodyBinnedSample =

	ROW(
	"DS0IntersectionCount", __DS0IntersectionCount
)

ORDER BY
